scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run test:backend:e2e && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:ui:admin: pnpm run test:e2e:ui:ports:free && cross-env PORT=8080 pnpm --filter admin-e2e exec playwright test --ui --ui-port=9323 --headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui:portal: pnpm run test:e2e:ui:ports:free && cross-env PORT=8081 pnpm --filter portal-e2e exec playwright test --ui --ui-port=9324 --headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui:both: pnpm run test:e2e:ui:ports:free && concurrently -k -n admin,portal -c cyan,green "cross-env PORT=8080 pnpm --filter admin-e2e exec playwright test --ui --ui-port=9323 --headed" "cross-env PORT=8081 pnpm --filter portal-e2e exec playwright test --ui --ui-port=9324 --headed"
